I can't even begin to say how comfortable this was.  I would say that I don't think of myself as tall (5'6"), and I wore flat sandals and it doesn't touch the floor.  I would have loved to see what a long would have looked.
There is NO give to the material, so ladies with broader shoulders or bigger arms - it's a tight squeeze with limited mobility!

The dress was beautiful--I ordered it for a black tie wedding in NYC and it would have been perfect, but unfortunately the dress was a bit too big, which made it unflattering. I'm 5'7" about 150 lbs and usually where a size 8, but for some reason this didn't hug me, it was just too large all around. I ordered the 8R and 8L thinking that I might need the long with the 3.5" heels I was planning on wearing, but the regular length would have been perfect. Next time I'll ordered the 6R!

review_summary: Tons of compliments on this dress!
review_text: Super comfortable fabric, conservative overall with flair of the cut out.

Loved this dress and got so many compliments! The straps are long, but you could pin them if you need to. I'm normally a 2 or 4, and the 2 fit fine (despite other reviews saying it runs small through the chest-- I'm a 32DD and didn't have a problem).   Would love to own this dress!

i'm typically a 2/4 but equipment runs large so an XS was perfect. i have broad shoulders and even the XS fit my shoulders well, plenty of room at waist, hits few inches above the knee. works well w tights for colder weather. loved the double layer skirt, gives it more volume, extremely comfortable. highly highly recommend, can easily be dressed down or worn to work then happy hr.

review_summary: I received so many compliments on this dress! Perfect amount of elegance and comfort!
review_text: Dress runs true to size. I usually wear medium tops and size six dresses, but I wore the small. It fit perfect on top, but the length was a little long for me, even with heels. I would rent again, though!

review_summary: This dress if simple and gorgeous.
review_text: In my opinion, the pictures don't do this dress justice. The deep V is really flattering without being too much for an event like a wedding. The material was nice and heavy and the dress was very flattering, so no spanx necessary. The dress does run quite large. I'm usually always a 16 and I wore the 14 and thought that was even a little roomy. I wore this to a wedding and got so many compliments on it.

Unique- the pattern reminds me a bit of 80's pop art. Very tight throughout but not too short and doesn't show much cleavage, so still classy. I think with the white and bright blue it works for either day or night. I wore it for daytime and felt fine. Though tight I find Herve dresses to be super comfortable. The top on this was slightly big on me, and I have an average sized chest. If you are small on top, might need to add some padding- but the dress would easily accommodate it.

review_summary: Did not end up wearing this due to the large slit in the front of the dress!
review_text: The fit runs small - I am a pretty solid size 6 and this was very snug. Additionally, if you are tall, the split in the front of the dress hit me in a very weird place when I tried it on (I'm 5'9"). I didn't feel comfortable in it even with opaque tights and I found the skirt very restrictive.

I love this dress so much I have rented it twice. Perfect because I can wear a normal bra under it. Very flattering and forgiving and the sequins weren't a bother like I thought they would be. The second time I rented it (same size) the bust fit a bit different so I had to safety pin it, but no one could tell. Very comfortable to dance the night away in. I have a large chest so I was nervous about this being too revealing but it was great.
Super flattering and slimming, fits snug and supportive but not too tight. Very comfortable!

Rented this as an option for a wedding, but didn't end up wearing it since the material was too heavy for the humidity and the waist/hips ran large. I'm busty and the top wasn't a problem, so overall I'd say this dress runs a little large.
The fit is tight - needed a friend to help zip it up, but on the pro side, no need for a bra and stayed put all night.  Really fun shape and color, with great material!  Overall loved it.

I really enjoyed wearing this dress and felt comfortable in it.  The colors were beautiful.  There was a little too much exposure in the bust area if I didn't really work hard to stand up straight.  The length was good, but like other reviewers, I did find that it frequently caught on my heels as I walked.  Overall, I really liked wearing the dress and would consider it again.

This is a lovely dress but wasn't quite right for me. I got is as my back up dress to try for another event. It's eye catching and I can see why others loved it. It fit me perfectly and is very flattering. But the color didn't seem to compliment me.  Bummer because I loved the color of the dress!

This dress is very cute.  The "cape" style sleeves are an interesting detail, and overall it is a great casual dress.  I am 5"10", so I thought it was a little short for what I would be comfortable with, but I wore it anyway for a daytime event.  Probably not long enough to wear to work, though!  As other reviews have stated, there is no stretch in the fabric, so the waist seam was tight.  Definitely size up for comfort!

I am usually a size 2 or 4, but ended up wearing the 6.  The 4 fit me fine, but the 6 gave me a little bit more room to move around but was not big on me.  The inner liner was maybe a little too long and stuck out past the dress when I sat, but standing it was not noticeable.  I would rent this again.

review_summary: Such a fun dress to wear to a Cape Cod wedding!
review_text: The XS was not as snug as desired in the chest area for me.  With that said, it didn't hinder my dancing through the night!  The material is thick and high quality.  The skirt is fun to spin in!

review_summary: Gorgeous color and style -- perfect for a nice event.
review_text: I'm glad I read reviews from others with similar height/weight, because I changed my order to include a higher size and ended up wearing that.  The dress is gorgeous, flattering, and comfortable.  You will need  stick-on bra.

The material is really soft and comfy and the style is fun. Fit was a little small if you're big-busted, even the 12 was sliding off to the sides. Definitely has a very Michael Jackson meets Chanel vibe which is what I loved about it. It IS warm so if you'll be wondering around in 60° weather and want a sweater alternative this is a great choice.

I was so excited about this dress.  Unfortunately, it arrived in a 10R rather than the 10L I ordered, and so it barely touched the floor when I wore flats.  Not a good look.  Otherwise, it is a beautiful, classic silhouette, and the beadwork on the shoulder is stunning.

This dress was surprisingly comfortable and warm. I ended up forgoing a bra because I couldn't find a low back option with enough support but the dress fit so well it wasn't necessary. I got tons of compliments from other women and even a kiss on the hand by a total stranger. I felt amazing and confident in this dress but I have to mention that the material on one of the sleeves was torn away from the elastic band at the wrist. Fortunately, it wasn't noticeable at all except for the random sequin that fell off from time to time.

This was my backup if the short version of the dress was too short and I decided not to wear it. I am very tall, but this hem hit me in the most unfortunate spot. Sort or an inch or two above the ankle. So bad. If I wasn't so curvy in the tummy and butt, maybe it would have laid better, but it was just awful. I guess the 22L would have been better (I thought I did order the long). The short one looked fun and sexy, where as the long one looked matronly and heavy. Hated it!

Such a fun pattern and comfy fit for casual summer days. The defined waist also gives an hour glass shape. One thing I will recommend is if you are larger chested definitely go up a size or 2. I am a size 32a and the 0 was very snug on me without a bra.

review_summary: beautiful color and lace, many compliments
review_text: a little on the longer side, hit at or below my knee. very comfortable.

I wore this to the office and to a daytime brunch and got a lot of compliments.  It's more low-cut than I expected, but with the long sleeves, it still felt modest enough for a more casual day at the office.  The fabric is a cotton, so it's not fancy.  I wore this early in my second trimester, and, at least at that stage, it was bump friendly!

review_summary: Very classic look! Perfect for a work show and drink after.
review_text: Very comfortable for the most part. My only complaint would be that the material doesn't have any stretch and a tiny bit would be nice in the arm area (I have muscular shoulders/arms).
The dress has the perfect fit.
The shoulder details are exquisite.

review_summary: Elegant fit with the right amount of shine!
review_text: I took the advice of others in assuming this dress runs a bit small - I normally wear a 4, but the 6 fit perfectly! (By the end of the night, it was getting a bit uncomfortable around the ribs, so I can only imagine how tight the 4 would have been!)  I normally wear a Long, but wanted to wear flats, so chose the regular - it was maybe an inch too short, but worked well with the shoes I had!  I would highly recommend this dress - its very flattering & elegant!

I didn't get to wear this dress to my event as the zipper was extremely hard to get up.The dress fit fine once we got it but it took me and my two roommates to  get the zipper over the part where the bottom of the dress connects with the top.

review_summary: This dress was perfect for an outdoor wedding!
review_text: This dress was great!  It fit really well and was very comfortable.  The only negative is that the length is a little odd so it made walking up stairs and getting into the car a little difficult.  I'm 5'3", 140 lbs and the medium fit perfectly.

review_summary: I rented this for my rehearsal dinner, and it was beautiful.
review_text: I also wore this for my wedding after party.  The back is the best part.  I didn't wear a bra and it wasn't see through.  It was very comfortable too.
Great for a hot summer day!

review_summary: The color and fit of this dress made it an absolute standout!
review_text: This dress was perfect for my best friend's bridal shower that was an evening cocktail party. The color popped and the overall fit of the dress was fantastic.

review_summary: Very classy, just not quite the fit I was expecting.
review_text: I got so many compliments on this dress!! I have pretty average sized hips but it hugged them much tighter than I expected. I might have worn the 6, but it was too big in the top. However, I think the tightness only bothered me because everyone else said it looked fine!! If I rented this dress again I would get a 6 long. I am 5'9" and it was just a tad too short and I was wearing flats.

This style runs a bit large, so you should size down from your usual size for your back up. It is better for larger busted women, as there is a lot of room in that area. The perfect dress for a holiday party this season. Pair with gold accessories and shoes!

I rented this dress for my son's baptism.  While modifying a previous rental, I was nervous I would need a bigger size in this dress and changed my size selection.  When I received my shipment I was surprised to see they sent me all three sizes (8,10,12).  It was a good thing they did, because I wound up needing the 8.  RTR customer service is great!!  My only fear in renting this dress and reading the other reviews was that it would be too short.  I am 5'6 and always feel like dresses are too short on me, even when they really aren't.  It wasn't THAT short, I did get away with wearing it, I was just mindful in any movements I made.  I was able to wear regular undergarments and it was not tight on my midsection.  It was a very comfortable fit. I was happy with this rental and received a lot of compliments on it.  I just wish it was a little longer, but overall a great rental.

Both the 10 and the 12 fit me but I ended up going with the 12 because it didn't show as much chest. (There was more than enough room in the chest for even a large chested woman)  Very nice fabric and hangs nicely. The tuxedo flap wasn't overboard and worked to help cover my problem area in the waist. Would highly recommend!
The fit was snug, but like a bandage dress, was very flattering.  It was quite comfortable to wear, and I received many compliments.

review_summary: Beautiful skirt that can be dressed up or down. Made me feel elegant and flirty!
review_text: Gorgeous colors!
It fits great! It was loose in the mid section which I appreciated. Kinda short when I sat down. I rented this to take some save the date photos and wedding dress shopping.

Wore it to a 40th birthday party. The top is rather low cut, but with some double sided tape you are good to go. I haven't done a romper before and was pleasantly surprised with how it fit and looked, very comfortable and the color was gorgeous!

review_summary: Dress is gorgeous, but runs large
review_text: What a shame this dress was too large! My backup/smaller size was unavailable so unfortunately I ended up wearing a different dress I had rented as a backup. I would rent it again, but next time would rent one and even TWO sizes smaller!  The website will not allow me to update my profile/size so here it is: Height: 5"6 Weight: 140lbs Bust: 32DDD Normally wear size 10 dress-- the dress I ordered was a 10 and it was so loose that the fabric covering the bust fell a full inch below the edge of my strapless bra. Keep in mind the sheer fabric of the neckline and arms is very sheer. You would see a nude bra strap and this necessitates a low cut strapless bra.  This dress is colorful, dramatic and elegant-- absolutely gorgeous.
the dress was a little loose normally waer a 6 and the 4 was still a little big

review_summary: Beautiful Dress Just Not For Me
review_text: I loved this dress, but it didn't fit me quite right.  Its a beautiful fabric and color.  I am usually a O or 2 and 115, 5'5 and 32C.  I ordered the 2 based on other comments.  The length and hips were great, but the waist was very snug (fit but uncomfortable while sitting) and the bodice was a little loose.

I rented this dress for a black tie wedding.  It is even prettier in person.   I ordered the Long and am so happy I did.  I am 5'8" and wore 4" heels and it was the perfect length.  I was able to wear a regular bra. I got complements all evening. I would definitely recommend his dress!
It was a little short, but so comfortable. I wore it to a friend's wedding, and got so many compliments! I would definitely rent this again!

review_summary: I wore this dress for a pre-wedding photo shoot and LOVED it!! Pretty, comfortable, and fun!
review_text: This dress is awesome! It was everything I had hoped it would be. I'm really glad I ordered the 4R and the 6R. They weren't too different except that the 6R had a bit more fabric bunching up right at the waistline. Unless you are a true 2 I would highly recommend getting the 4R, and the 6R as back up, depending on the size of your bust. Sometimes I can wear a 2 depending on the dress, but I don't think the 2 would have fit me. This dress is fun, photographs well (especially while dancing and twirling), and made me feel so pretty. ***Look out for the long tulle back when getting out of vehicles or standing up from a seated position. Your heels can easily catch the back of the dress and tear the tulle.

review_summary: I felt absolutely beautiful. Compliments were flowing like a fountain of my favorite Cabernet.
review_text: This dress is absolutely beautiful. It was the perfect amount of sexy.  I usually wear a 4-6 in dresses; depends on the brand. I ordered the 4r & 6r. I felt and looked like a sausage in the 4r, but only felt like a sausage in the 6 (thank goodness for spanx). The length was perfect, the color was perfect, but the straps kept falling and I could've gone up a size or lost weight( didn't have time for either).  Either way, I'm happy that I chose RTR ; I felt and looked great

I received lots of compliments in this stunning leather gown. I am 5'6" and the gown just skimmed the floor when I was shoeless. I liked the deep v in the front and in the back, and I ended up wearing this without a bra because the v in the back was just enough to show the strap of every bra I tried it with. It didn't matter, because the bodice fit very well and I felt comfortable all night. The dress is lined and the leather is matte and lightweight. My backup size was 6 and that fit nicely too but not snug enough up top to go bra less.

Loved the dress, it was exactly what I imagined when I rented it.  This was my first RTR experience and I was not disappointed.  I wore it to a North Carolina fall wedding. This dress is comfortable, even on the arms which was a concern.  It was somewhat restrictive when it came to raising the roof on the dance floor...but perhaps that's in everyone's best interest. :)
Great color and material. Only issue was that the 8R was so short! I'm only 5'6" and wore maybe 4 inch heels and couldn't stand the way they looked together!

review_summary: I wore this dress for my 20 year high school reunion that was held in a banquet hall.
review_text: I probably teeter between a size 6 and an 8 and the size  6 fit perfectly.  I didn't have to wear a bra and I was very comfortable all night.  The material is a bit thicker than you would expect and it was nice to have "coverage" and not be see through or thin.  It is a dark dark green color, but looks black.  I wore gold jewelry and black heels.  I love this dress.

I rented this dress in my usual size 2 and a backup size 4. I ended up wearing the 4  because the slip beneath the chiffon was a little too tight on the 2. If you are curvy at all on the bottom, I would recommend ordering up a size as a back up. The other reviews are correct in that the top doesn't lay flat if you are small chested. I had to get creative with some fashion tape, but it stayed in place all night. It flowed beautifully when I walked and looked great in photographs. I received tons of compliments! It's a timeless, classy dress!

review_summary: It was my niece Bridal Shower and it was a high tea affair. The jumper was perfect.
review_text: It fit perfect just the smell when they arrived I had to taken them both to be cleaned. In the end the jumper was comfy and worked well with the High Tea Bridal Shower theme

I wore this to an outdoor vintage country wedding. It was perfect for the occasion!   I wore it with a jcrew necklace that made it perfect! The dress was the right length for my 5'4 frame if I was any taller I wouldn't be able to lift my arms. Not easy to buckle shoes in this dress so you may need some help:) I received so many complements and was told I looked classy and sexy!!
This dress is really comfortable. It's simple but the pattern gives it a little something extra.

review_summary: Fun and different take on a gala look
review_text: I'm on the board of a nonprofit that does an annual "Blue and Green Gala" so I needed something in that color palette. This romper was so much fun and I will have a hard time improving on it at this year's event! I tied a green scarf around the waist to pull the whole green/blue theme together and got lots of compliments. One word of warning: I'm very short so the length wasn't an issue for me but I could see it being an issue for people who've cracked 5'.

I wore this dress to a cocktail charity event and felt like the loveliest woman in the room!  This dress was exactly as pictured with one exception. I am busty, 36D, and the neckline looked very different on me than it does on the model. Lots of cleavage! My husband didn't mind though! The fit was amazing and I am curvy, the fabric had just the right amount of give. I can see it looking lovely also on a figure less so, like the model pictured. Loved the colors and the bit of shimmer. I wore it with the necklace pictured and while it was lovely and did pair well with the dress, it was a bit over the top for me personally because of the aforementioned cleavage issue but overall I was delighted.

Very beautiful dress, but watch out if you have full hips - under the sheer overlay there is a tight fitting dress that does not have any stretch.  Also, although the description says it can be worn with any normal bra, I don't agree - because the material was so sheer on top, only a strapless bra would really the best.
Overall fit comfortable. It's not long, so I have a longer torso which didn't make it as flowy on me. The back is really cute. Overall better for shorter girls.

review_summary: This dress was stunning and I felt like a princess all night!
review_text: I loved the flowy material and the way the dress moved. It fit perfectly and I wish I could own it! I'm 5'5" and was able to wearing 3.5" heels with the dress just barely touching the ground. The zipper was difficult but I was able to do it on my own. I tried to get away with wearing a regular bra but my straps kept sliding out so I recommend taking others' suggestions and wearing either a racerback or no bra at all. I got compliments on this dress all night and would rent again if the opportunity present's itself!

review_summary: Dress looked amazing! Not my style, but thought I would give it a try!
review_text: Super flattering! I am usually a size 6/M.  I have a DD chest and this dress was so flattering on.

I usually wear a size 0 and decided to wear the MR as it was more comfortable around the neck and chest area. I would say this dress runs small. Loved the dress. It was very easy to wear once I decided to wear the bigger size.

review_summary: Super cute and fun romper! Very classic with a twist of sexy.
review_text: This was an adorable piece, I enjoyed wearing it and got a lot of compliments. My only complaint is the shoulders kept wanting to creep up, so I was constantly pulling them down and the elastic was very uncomfortable on my arms. Runs large! I wore a size down.

review_summary: This dress is a stand out in a sea of black dresses.
review_text: Not sure how the crowd was going to accept my eclectic style figured the majority of the party-goers for this event would wear black. This dress is a stand out in a sea of black dresses.  I wanted to stand out but not too much. The blue is rich, vibrant and the cut of the dress a head-turner for the curvy girl.
Loved the pattern on this dress but it was too wide around the waist. I wore a cross-body purse with it which gave me some shape but it looked a bit like a maternity dress!

review_summary: I wore this dress for my 21st birthday and was, by far, the best dressed in the room.
review_text: Fits great. I ordered a medium and a large, and the medium fit like a glove. It was the most perfect dress I've ever worn. The arms were a bit itchy but nothing major.

review_summary: Love the color and the detail This Dress is super sexy. Only problem it Runs a bit small.
review_text: Fit it very tight but in a flattering way, just make sure you are aware it will be exact so you may want to get a size bigger just in case, the straps in the back pops out a bit so make sure to keep a nice posture. After that super sexy everyone loved it specially my boyfriend so ladies it is an awesome dress to rent.

review_summary: This dress was so comfortable it made the night even more unforgettable . Love love love this dress!
review_text: I rented both the xs and sm both fit almost identical! I ended up wearing the xs because the hem on the sm was just not laying right!  I paired this dress with all rose gold accessories and received complements on how beautiful my dress was!  This dress was so comfortable, elegant and did not make me hot at all with all the dancing I did

review_summary: Perfect for standing out at a spring wedding
review_text: This is a very feminine, bright and fun dress for dancing all night at a wedding.  The unique silhouette and vibrant colors made it stand out.  I was at a family wedding but got lots of compliments from strangers.  It was a little short in the front, but the longer hem in the back made me feel justified wearing it to a church ceremony.

review_summary: Perfect Dress for a Destination Wedding!
review_text: It was super hot in Mexico especially at 5pm when the wedding started. Loved that this material was heavy enough not to sweat through but light enough that I wasn't dying wearing the dress. The dress runs true to size though definitely shows any curves your body has so spanx was necessary to keep it all together! Would totally rent again. I got so many compliments and the dress photographs really well....
Hard to zip.  Did not end up wearing.  Pretty gown, but not as pretty as picture

review_summary: Even strangers in the bathroom complemented me!
review_text: As others have said, it runs a bit long for a shorter girl (Im 5'2") but it was classy and elegant for the conservative wedding I attended.  At first it seemed tight in the sleeves but I didn't notice it throughout the night.  The 4 was too baggy on me.  The color is unique and lovely.

I rented this for my engagment party and I loved it! Being petite the back did gap some but with some fasion tape everything staeyed in place. Since I usually flex between two sizes it was great that i was sent two sizes. The dress itself was in great conditon and it was even prettier in person. I would highly recomend this dress!

review_summary: Great dress for a night out on the town - get ready for some head turns!
review_text: Pros: The dress was fitted and fit great!  But, wearing a bra was not a true option.  I had to wear a stick on bra and it worked out fine.  However, perhaps clear duct tape would have been more "supportive."  The color was gorgeous, the fabric was nice and thick, so if you weren't self conscious like myself, you could go bra-less.  LOVED that I could put a blazer over it and it's an unsuspecting work dress and take off the blazer and it has tons of WOW factor.  Would definitely recommend renting this dress!   The ONLY Con: And maybe this was just for me - the zipper in the back does pucker a bit and this contributes to the dress riding up as you walk.  I assume most folks don't mind that...but it was a cold night - and I LOVED the elegant look of the dress at my knees.  But, truth be told - NOT a big deal at all.

This was the first time I wore something with such a deep plunge so I felt pretty daring. Between that and sparkling all over, it made quite a statement and I received many compliments from strangers. I opted for adhesive bra cups but I'm sure there are other options that would work, maybe with some creative pinning, since the dress has actual straps. The length was okay since I was wearing low heels, but if you're tall and plan to wear high heels, probably look for a long length. I'm generally between a 14 and 16 and this fit perfectly in 14. I would definitely rent this again, or one of the many similar colors/cuts from Badgley Mischka.

review_summary: Loved the color for a fall wedding, perfect length for dancing!
review_text: The medium weight was perfect for a fall wedding in Boston. I paired with a nude heel since the color was so unique. Very comfortable and flattering to wear. I did not have any issues with the sleeves being too tight but I could not comfortably lift my arms above my shoulder height because it would pull up the rest of the torso fabric in an awkward way (not really a big deal for a semi-formal wedding).

review_summary: This dress was perfect for my bridal shower!
review_text: Great fit, only thing was the low plunge and having to wear a bra. In some photos you can see my bra.

This dress was exactly what I wanted for my event. As noted by other reviewers, the fabric is lighter than the average full-length gown, which made the dress breathable and easy to dance in. I loved the double slits, which added drama and movement. The fabric is thin, so it is not the best choice if you are looking for a bump-friendly dress. As for sizing, it is true to American sizing, not couture sizing, so no need to size-up. I wore the 4R but would have probably been a little more comfortable in the 2. Overall, I really liked this dress and would recommend it!

I ordered this dress for my engagement party and ended up wearing the back up dress and loving it so much more.  It was really large up top and smaller on the bottom.  If It was mine and I could alter it, I would have loved it, but with such a large top it just was not flattering.

I loved this dress! It was so beautiful and received complements throughout the night. I ordered a 0 with a 2 as my back-up size and went with the 0. The 0 was a little snug around my bottom half, but the 2 was a bit loose at the top. I could have gone with either; I just preferred to have the top fitted so that the layer under the lace wouldn't dip too low. I ended up wearing a strapless bra with this (the back is high enough that it's covered), but I also probably could have gone without one. The dress was definitely longer on me that it is on the model, but the picture I included makes it look an inch or two longer than it actually was.  As an aside about RTR, I had scheduled the dress to arrive the day before I had to fly out for the wedding, but the UPS center lost power and the dress hadn't come before I had to leave. I called RTR (in a panic), and they had the dress (in both the original and back-up sizes) overnighted to my hotel for no extra charge. They didn't have the earrings I had ordered, so they sent me an upgraded pair. On top of all of this, the person I spoke with at RTR was so incredibly kind and made everything really easy. I'd recommend this dress and RTR to anyone!
The front of this dress fits nicely as a shift, but the back is the real show. The length and size was great. Usually a 4, I sized down to a 2 and felt very comfortable.

Loved this dress! It photographed so well for my engagement photos. I ordered both the 4L and 6L, the 4L was too short even without heels. I am 5'8" and with 3" heels the 6L worked much better. The neckline also was cutting into my neck so I was pulling it down a lot but overall I loved this dress.
This was such a cute pattern and fabric. I wore this to work and traveled home. It was certainly an eye catcher! I recommend belting it to show off your curves.

I was receiving compliments all night long. The dress is super comfortable and fun to wear. The shorter front makes it easier to walk, while the longer train adds the glam. The pleats and thicker fabric allow the dress to billow out too, which is lovely. I also loved the pockets. One thing to point out is that the dress is quite heavy so if you plan on dancing, be prepared to hold up your dress as people will step on your train. I give this dress a 4 out of 5, is because the dress had a bit too much room in the chest area for size 0. I am an A cup, and there was room in the dress for a C cup at least. I did read previous reviews that the dress was great for larger breasts, but I assumed the size of the cup would be adjusted for size 0.  Stick on cups were my best friends that night.

I wore it to the Met Opera and I stole the show. This dress is a show stopper. All eyes were on me, I was the center of attraction, the queen of the night and a shining star. The compliments were nonstop. The dress fits just fine. I ordered size 6R and 8R but ended up wearing the 6R. I'm usually between size 4 and 6. The 6 was perfect. The only issue with this dress is that I wish the regular length was longer but other than that, everything was perfect. Do not waste time renting this dress, just get it now! You will be glad you did.

review_summary: This dress kept me cool in the heat!
review_text: The dress fit nicely, though looking back I would have worn spanx as the skirt doesn't flare out all that much. The color is amazing. The dress was also surprisingly cool. I wore it to a reception dinner, outside in 90 degree heat, and stayed comfortable the whole time.

review_summary: Perfect dress for a girls day out!
review_text: I wore this dress to a summer wine festival last August. I received a ton of compliments on it. The material is good quality, very nice and thick. There is no stretch. I normally wear a size 6 or 8 in Lilly dresses and I sized up to the 8 for this dress.

review_summary: Comfortable dress, true to size, a little short
review_text: I rented this dress for a gala. Loved the stretch to the fabric and the cutout! The dress was comfortable and easy to dance in. The only con was that I felt like the dress was a little short with heels.
Great for an all day event, easy to dress up and down with different accessories. Color pops anywhere.  Would recommend, but the drawstring can be bit frumpy on us short girls.

Classy, comfy, gorgeous and fun to twirl around/dance in!  You can't tell from the photos, but the dress is connected with nude mesh at the midsection.  I'm 5'4 and the XSR was the perfect length with 3 inch heels.

review_summary: Wasn't my original pick but I ended up feeling like a million dollars!
review_text: This dress was recommended by a stylist after my original pick arrived damaged.  The stylist hit this nail on the head with the recommendation!   The dress was great for the environment- classy yet sexy.   The fabric was very nice and just made me feel great wearing it.   I would definitely rent this dress again.   I paired it with boots and it was great!

review_summary: The dress fit so true to size and was so pretty in person!
review_text: The fit was great and tight enough on top to go without a bra! The dress is heavier in person then it looks online but was overall a gorgeous dress for the outdoor tea party we went to and would be a perfect holiday or wedding guest dress! I usually wear a 4 or 6 and the 6 fit perfectly

review_summary: This dress is a great attention grabber at work.  It is stylish & unique with its flared out sleeves
review_text: If you have wide hips like I do it is snug in that area.  I am a size 8 and wore a large and found it very snug in the hips.  So I would say ti runs on the small side. Since when is a size 8 considered large?

Rented this dress with my $50 Pro credit to wear out for my birthday dinner. It was casual enough that I didn't feel overdressed at the restaurant, but glitzy enough that I felt special on my birthday. I absolutely love the fabric and color. The dress was a bit loose in the waist but that didn't really matter. My only complaint is that there are sequins right under the arms that ended up being a little irritating by the end of the night. For a size reference, I am usually between a 16 in regular sizes and a 14W in plus, and this dress seemed to be very true to the size chart.

I felt like a billion bucks! Loved this dress. I was confused and a bit nervous after reading all of the reviews, because I wasn't sure what to expect and didn't have a backup plan. I did have to go a size up from my  usual size, and I wouldn't have minded a bit more length and would probably go with the long rather than regular length if I could do it again. But it didn't matter that much because of the wrap-around style and short skirt in front. I wore edgy, lace-up shoes with my hair loose and bouncy to balance it all out. It definitely has a gunmetal shimmer and works well with dark silvery accessories. And at an event with 10,000 people, I never saw anyone else with the same dress on so I was happy about that. My only complaint is that it doesn't have any stretch, so it's a bit confining. But overall, I loved it and would absolutely recommend it for any black tie affair!

The dress fit very well.  I liked the sleeves as it was very cold that night (it even snowed a little bit).  I got many compliments.  I also liked to color as I wore it for a Christmas party and everyone else was in red, green, or black.  I would rent this dress again.

I wore this to my boyfriends holiday party. I ended up wearing a size lower than usual since the cutout looks better when it's fitted. The material has a little stretch and it was form fitting. I loved the color and paired it with a statement necklace and nude pumps. I recommend this dress and thought it was both cute and flattering!

review_summary: Wore it to a rehearsal dinner for a good friend's wedding.  It was classy and pretty, felt great.
review_text: The dress looked great.  Fit exactly as expected.  The lace arms were flattering (not too tight) and the length was just at the knee...very classy and comfortable.

review_summary: Beautiful color - business in front and party in back!
review_text: Very pretty dress.  Runs pretty true to size (I haven't gotten back to my profile stats post baby).  Runs kinda long (I am 5'4" and wore like 3.5" heels and maybe should have gone petite).  Also, I did not realize low back when I booked it so had to get some last minute undergarment fix but the low back ended up being fun.

This skirt is super cute. The waistline hits at your natural waist and is not too tight to cause discomfort. Because I'm so short, the skirt hit a bit longer on me than on the model but was still above my knees.

The colors of this dress are absolutely beautiful, picture doesn't do it justice. I received so many compliments throughout the entire day, I felt like a Princess! I normally wear an 8 and this fit very well, has a little bit of "give" to the material. If I were to rent this particular dress again, I would probably get the 10 because the neckline and the chest are a bit snug. Absolutely loved this dress and so did everyone else!

review_summary: Perfect vacation dress after a long day in the sun!
review_text: I loved this dress! Usually mumus do not work for me- I'm on a slender build so I usually look swallowed up in them, but for whatever reason, this dress looked amazing. I think it's probably a sisterhood of the traveling dress type deal. I loved the ties around the neck and sleeve details. I wasn't sunburned but it would've been great for too much sun due to the loose fit or if on vacation you are ready for a big dinner, you won't have to worry about looking great versus eating all the seafood you can!

review_summary: The neckline on this dress is SO flattering.
review_text: I felt like a million bucks! I went with the 10, even though I am normally an 8 as it felt more comfortable in the bust.  I got a ton of compliments on the dress, the color and neckline are BEAUTIFUL. Would 100% rent again and recommend to others.

Loved the black and olive combination on this dress and the shape all the detailing gave me. I went up a size after reading some reviews that this could be tight through the bust, and the S was a perfect fit. Very comfortable for work and will definitely be renting again!

review_summary: The dress came on time, it firt, i got tons of compliments, especialy from my husband. And sending it back was simple as can be!
review_text: I am the queen of black for all occasions, so this was a very out of the box choice for me. Loved this dress! I was nervious it wouldnt fit, I am curvy and very busty. Very flattering fit. As someone who is large chested i loved being able to wear a bra and not having to worry about any straps showing. The dress was stunning. It looks more yellow gold in the picture, but it is actually a pinkish gold. Great first experience on rent the runway!!! And I got tons of compliments, especialy from my husband.

The 4 was a smidge too big on me and the 2 was just a wee bit tight, but I wore the 2 because the fit looked better. However, after dinner I was really wishing I had the 4 in my car to change into!! :) The sleeves are very cute, but your arm range is limited. It wasn't the most comfortable dress I've ever worm, but it was really cute and different and I was very happy with my rental!

review_summary: A little girl on the street squealed, "Mommy! It's a princess!" as I walked by.
review_text: Beautiful dress.  Received multiple compliments.  Photographs beautifully.   Runs long (I'm 5'7" and wore 3 inch heels) and I had to pick up my dress to walk all night.   Granted, as it drapes beautifully, it looked nice even as I carried it.  I found it slipped on me and I spent a lot of time pulling up the dress.

review_summary: I didn't end up wearing this dress
review_text: I didn't order this dress and the fit was kind of weird. The front ruffle made it look a bit like a nursing shirt.
I really liked this dress, but I could have gotten a size, or even two sizes, smaller. It just hung on me, but with a belt, it worked.

review_summary: Very comfortable and elegant. Received many compliments!
review_text: Length was good with 3" heels. Back was a bit tight but I have broad shoulders. Overall, great dress. Loved the lace!

This dress is a beautiful vibrant red so perfect for the holiday season! It is elegant yet very sexy and so comfortable!! I have yet to see a designer execute that combination as well as Nicole Miller! The fabric has enough stretch for my very curvy figure, which made it easy to dance & eat as much as I wanted :) HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!!!

The fabric is a bit stiff, which is probably why it holds a wrinkle. After sitting at my desk most of the day, the dress ended up all wrinkled even though I had steamed it before wearing. I do love the print. I'd rent this again if I knew I'd be standing all day in the dress.  Heeded the warning of some other reviews. Did not wear it backwards!

This dress fit me like a glove!  Petite friendly dress! Herve Leger never disappoints. The bandages keeps everything together and the top surprisingly did not keep falling down for me. I am usually very small chested, so I was surprised the top stayed; but I did use fashion tape as an extra measure. It is very tight, so you will definitely need another person to help you get into this dress!

review_summary: The dress is so beautiful. I received compliments all night long.
review_text: I actually ordered this with the intent of wearing the 2R but because of my cup size (DDD), it didn't work. The 4R managed to accommodate my cup size without being too big everywhere else. The built in bra helped, however, I still had to tug the dress up every now and again to make sure it didn't slide down too much.   The dress did come very wrinkled. The wedding was out of state, so I steamed it before I packed it and still ironed it before I wore it.

I wore this over a simple pair of leggings on a day I was running errands just to bump up the outfit a little bit. The top was SUPER soft and comfy but found it a little boxy and not flattering. Plus it wrinkled extremely easily so didn't look the same at the end of the day. Still a cute, versatile top though! If I were to rent this again, I would wear it to work instead

Wore this to to work and everyone loved it! Colors are cheerful and stand out. I was the best-dressed lawyer in town that day! Wore it again out to dinner at one of the better local restaurants too. It was too big but fabric was very comfortable and flattering--knit, but not too clingy, and it hung so beautifully that it still looked good. Arrived brand-new with tags on. Great pick RTR!

review_summary: We attended an awards dinner celebrating outstanding physicians in our community.
review_text: The dress was beautiful: the blue just as rich as in the pictures and the gold lace stunning in person. I received compliments all night. The material was a heavier, stretchy material. It was comfort, but very fitted. Because it was so fitted, I sized up and wore shapewear to smooth out reality and accentuate the right curves. I would wear this dress again.

review_summary: Felt great in this classic lace dress!
review_text: Had to wear the larger size (I rented a 6 and an 8).  The 6 fit everywhere aside from the chest/shoulders area.  Lace does not 'give' at all and I didn't want to run the risk of ripping the dress from hugging someone or busting out the wrong dance move...LOL! My friend pictured with me actually rented her dress as well - they were very similar in style. Overall, very nice dress for a classy, elegant event.

review_summary: Felt beautiful in the dress! Perfect for Easter brunch.
review_text: It was tight around the bust and needed help zipping it up, I am a 36C - This dress has no give to it! The pleats in the skirt and the pockets made the dress. Photographs really well.

review_summary: Loved wearing a pretty new dress.
review_text: The band has no give, so don't overeat! The pockets are fantastic. I wore a sticky nubra. Quality is great and I looked amazing in the dress. Wore it for a surprise wedding anniversary party.

review_summary: Fabulous Jumpsuit for a Disco Party
review_text: I loved wearing this jumpsuit! It was comfortable and flattering. Bonus - I could put it on and take it off by myself, which is a big deal when nature calls during the evening. Definitely pair a great necklace with this jumpsuit. As others have said, the snap does come undone sometimes when hugging people or dancing, but nothing that can't be fixed with fashion tape or a safety pin. I received so many compliments. Loved it!

Nice is definitely the description for this dress. I wore this for work, so that's not a bad thing! It is light and perfect for warm spring and summer days. It buttons down the front, so if you are on the busty side the buttons may strain. I did like that there was a hook to keep the waist closed in addition to the button. Many of the dresses from RTR get a "wow" out of my husband, but this one only elicited "it's nice" and "safe." Considering I was wearing it to work "nice" and "safe" are fine descriptors in my opinion. A better way to describe it would be well made and conservative!

review_summary: Love the dress as soon as I tried it on...unfortunately, the zipper broke before I could wear it.
review_text: RTR to the rescue!  Due to my zipper mishap, they gave me a full refund and I look forward to renting from them again.    Dress was gorgeous.  Fabric has no stretch.  Small shoulder pads.  Jersey lining makes the dress a bit heavy but I'm sure very warm.  Zipper was dry and hard to zip up and down....hence, why it broke before I could wear it.

review_summary: This dress was amazing! It suited my figure and venue perfectly!
review_text: It fit perfectly even without a bra. The details were gorgeous. Received so many compliments on this dress. I am so happy that I went with this dress.
i think another reviewer said they borrowed it for Halloween to channel Wednesday Adams.  i rented it for work. flattering fit, material is thicker.  fun to accessorize with bracelets and rings.

review_summary: I had picked up some weight so this was very flattering yet forgiving.
review_text: The sheer cutouts was a plus. It was short enough to wear flats, but long enough to wear heels!  The color was more of a garnet color

review_summary: Absolutely beautiful dress for a beach vacation!
review_text: I absolutely LOVED this dress! I rented this for a beach vacation (easy to pack!) and paired it with a jean jacket for a casual dinner. The material was super light and breathable - I felt very comfortable wearing this in the Caribbean heat. The back dips low, so I opted not to wear a bra, which was not a problem because the material in the bust has some gathering (plus, I'm not that busty!). The lengths of the straps are adjustable, so I didn't have to worry about pinning the front. It was roomy in the hips. The Petite length was perfect for me to wear with flat sandals. If I was to wear this dress with heels, I would have gotten the Regular length. Over 50% of the time I wear a S in dresses, but the XS fit me, no problem.
The dress was just a touch short, and slightly tight around my rib cage... But I loved the color and received a lot of compliments.

review_summary: Wasn't my first pick but the other dress I received was too big. RTR sent this and worked great!
review_text: Worked wonderful for the usmc ball I went to. Felt great all night. It was super comfortable and well made dress!

There was a small error with my order so I was able to pick a dress that RTR overnighted to me for my event. They ended up sending me this one and another so I wore one to the ceremony and one to the reception. RTR went above and beyond in my opinion. I loved this dress, gorgeous color. Very happy with my first rental.

I like the idea of this dress but the fit didn't work for me.  I am generally between a 0 and a 2 in all dresses, but the 2 in this dress hit me very strangely.  It wasn't too small in that I could zip it up no problem and it didn't feel tight, but it felt small in the way everything hit, ie: the waist band hit around my lower ribs and the darts at the hips  hit an inch or two above my hips.  It was almost like it was cut for petite sizing.  I also didn't like the way the cut ins at the sleeves hit, as they seemed to really highlight that little before the armpit skin squish that is no one's favorite thing to highlight.  Ended up sending back without wearing.

review_summary: Great rental for a last minute black tie event
review_text: I had two days to find a gown for a black tie event, so I went directly to the RTR outpost in NYC. I selected this dress because of its flowy skirt and gorgeous color, and I was complimented on it all night. However, three things worth mentioning: 1) The back closure (which is low on the back) was tight for me, and I was self-conscious about my backfat 2) The cleavage V in front hits low (around the breast bone) which, for me near petite frame, also meant that the shoulders could get a bit loose. I used double-sided tape to tape down the chest area of the dress as well as the straps 3) The store only had an R length, which was just right when I wore my really tall heels (around 3.5-4 inches), but when I walked up stairs, I often would still step on the skirt mistakenly or almost trip. So beware. Overall though, I loved this dress and felt really pretty in it all night!

review_summary: Loved it! Got many compliments and was very comfortable. It is thick and has shoulder pads as an FYI
review_text: LIttle short, but still suitable for a wedding guest! Could have been a little bit more fitted in the waist area.
Usually I wear an XS or even an XXS.  The XS was way too small.  The S was a tiny bit big, but I wore it anyway.  I got lots of compliments.  Great shirt!

review_summary: Great color for a seaside summer wedding!
review_text: This dress was very comfortable and got lots of compliments.  It was definitely unique compared to a lot of the other dresses I saw at the wedding (about 3-5 girls were wearing the same/similar dress as each other's from RTR but in different colors).  The reason I don't give it 5 stars is because I felt like the waist was a little high, and it wasn't very figure flattering because of it.  I probably wouldn't rent it again, but I don't regret it for this seaside wedding because of the cheerful color.

review_summary: Great dress. I normally wear a 2 but the 4 was a much better fit. Very fitted but great!
review_text: Runs small so if you normally wear a 2 get the 4. Fabric has some stretch to it which is great. A great dress.

I originally rented a 6 and an 8, but I would up wearing a 4 because the dress seemed to run large. I wanted to be able to wear a normal bra, which I was able to do, but the dress was low cut. The dress was comfortable and I received compliments all night!

review_summary: I didn't wear it but it would have been perfect. Just a tad to small and snug in the wrong places.
review_text: The dress would have been perfect in a size 10. I figured I would try the 8 and take a chance but just was too tight.

review_summary: Lots of compliments, but didn't fit as well as I would have liked.
review_text: I am normally a 14, but I have a large DD-E chest.  I wore the 16, because the 14 didn't fit my bust.  The dress was well-worn.  There were two holes in the lace.  I wore it anyway, because I had no other choices, and you couldn't really tell they were there.  It was very low-cut, and rather short.  I am 5'6", and it was fingertip length on me.  I wore it with a gold belt, and nude wedges.  Despite the issues, I received dozens of compliments.  It was nice to stand out a bit in such a vibrant color, as opposed to the many people who wore black and beige.

review_summary: Flatters all of the right places.
review_text: Great fit with fabric that  has some give to it.  The bow adds a great feature piece to this dress without being over the top.  I got complimented on this dress so many times.  Definitely going to rent it again.

review_summary: Rented this dress for an outdoor summer bridal shower--perfect!
review_text: Great fit, material has a nice weight to it. Got lots of compliments all day. Would definitely rent it again!

review_summary: First shot, not the best luck.
review_text: This dress is very long. Unless you are taller than 5'8" or want to wear sky high heels, I wouldn't recommend it. With 2" heels I was tripping over the Regular length.
